name: Banana Bread I
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt.
2. Cream butter and sugar until smooth.
3. Add eggs and vanilla extract, mixing well after each addition.
4. Add the flour mixture alternately with bananas, ensuring a smooth batter.
5. Fold in chopped nuts.
6. Pour the batter into a greased and floured 9x5x3-inch loaf pan (do not fill more than two-thirds full). Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 1 hour and 20 minutes. If needed, bake additional small batches of batter in muffin tins or divide the batter to make two smaller loaves, baking until browned and the bread pulls away from the sides of the pan.
